---
title: "Mapping Sites"
author: "Kwasi Wrensford"
date: "2026-03-24"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(vroom)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggfortify)
library(ggrepel)
library(forcats)
library(lubridate)
library(unmarked)
library(camtrapR)
library(overlap)
library(ggmap)
library(reshape2)
library(corrplot)
library(elevatr)
library(terra)
library(mapview)
library(tmap)
library(sf)
library(exactextractr)
library(xml2)
library(geodata)
library(viridis)
library(ggspatial)
library(tidyterra)
library(arcgislayers)
```

##Load in covariate dataset with lat and long
```{r}
covars <- read.csv("data/covars.csv")

covars_sf <- st_as_sf(
  covars,
  coords = c("Longitude", "Latitude"),
  crs = 4326
)

covars_vect <- vect(covars_sf)
```

```{r}
sf::st_is_valid(covars_sf)
nrow(covars_sf)
sf::st_geometry(covars_sf)

url <- "https://geospatial.alberta.ca/titan/rest/services/boundary/goa_administrative_area/MapServer/0"

canada <- gadm("Canada", level = 1, path = "data/")

alberta <- canada[canada$NAME_1 == "Alberta", ]

bbox <- alberta

elev <- get_elev_raster(locations = covars_sf, z = 10, clip = "bbox")
elev <- rast(elev)

hill <- terrain(elev, v = "slope", unit = "radians")
aspect <- terrain(elev, v = "aspect", unit = "radians")
hillshade <- shade(hill, aspect)
hillshade_gray <- terra::app(hillshade, fun = mean)
```

```{r}
#Download Alberta Bioregion data

bioregion_url <- "https://geospatial.alberta.ca/titan/rest/services/biota/natural_subregions_alberta_2005/MapServer/0"

layer <- arc_open(bioregion_url)
bioregions <- arc_select(layer)

#Transform natural region polygon to match cameras
bioregions <- st_transform(bioregions, st_crs(covars_sf))

#Join natural region polygons to camera data
covars_with_region <- st_join(covars_sf, bioregions)

names(bioregions)
unique(bioregions$NRNAME)
unique(bioregions$NSRNAME)

#Grassland Parkland region polygon

grass_park <- bioregions %>%
  filter(NRNAME %in% c("Grassland", "Parkland") | 
           NSRNAME == "Dry Mixedwoof"
         )

boreal_shield <- bioregions %>%
  filter(
    (NRNAME == "Boreal" & NSRNAME != "Dry Mixedwood") |
      NRNAME == "Canadian Shield"
  )

#Dissolve each group into a single polygon
grass_park_poly <- grass_park %>%
  dplyr::summarise(geometry = st_union(geometry)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(region_group = "Grassland + Parkland")

boreal_shield_poly <- boreal_shield %>%
  dplyr::summarise(geometry = st_union(geometry)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(region_group = "Boreal + Shield")

region_groups <- dplyr::bind_rows(grass_park_poly, boreal_shield_poly)


```

```{r}
target_crs <- st_crs(covars_sf)

hillshade <- terra::project(hillshade, target_crs$wkt)

#Crop hillshade file to Alberta boundaries
hillshade_crop <- crop(hillshade, bbox)
hillshade_crop <- mask(hillshade_crop, bbox)

# downsample by factor (e.g., 5 = 25× fewer cells)
hillshade_small <- aggregate(hillshade_crop, fact = 5, fun = mean)

hillshade_df <- as.data.frame(hillshade_small, xy = TRUE)
names(hillshade_df) <- c("x", "y", "value")


ggplot() +
  geom_raster(data = hillshade_df, aes(x = x, y = y, fill = value)) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "grey90", high = "grey60", guide = "none") +

  geom_sf(data = region_groups,
          aes(linetype = region_group),
          fill = NA,
          alpha = 0.25,
          linewidth = 0.6) +
  
 scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Grassland + Parkland" = "#1b9e77",
    "Boreal + Shield" = "#d95f02"
  ), name = "Region Group") +
  
  geom_sf(data = covars_sf,
          aes(color = hf),
          size = 2,
          alpha = 0.9) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "viridis", name = "HF") +

  coord_sf(expand = FALSE) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "right"
  )
```

```{r}
map_pc1 <- 
  tm_shape(hillshade_gray) + 
  tm_raster(palette = gray.colors(100), alpha = 0.5, legend.show = FALSE ) + 
  tm_shape(elev) + 
  tm_raster(palette = gray.colors(100), alpha = 0.4, legend.show = FALSE ) + 
  tm_shape(covars_sf) + 
  tm_dots(col = "PC1", palette = "viridis", size = 0.5, style = "cont") +
  tm_layout(
  legend.outside = TRUE,
  legend.outside.position = "right",
  legend.frame = FALSE,
  legend.text.size = 0.8,
  legend.title.size = 1
)


map_pc2 <- 
  tm_shape(hillshade_gray) + 
  tm_raster(palette = gray.colors(100), alpha = 0.5) + 
  tm_shape(elev) + 
  tm_raster(palette = gray.colors(100), alpha = 0.4) + 
  tm_shape(covars_sf) + 
  tm_dots(col = "PC2", palette = "viridis", size = 0.5, style = "cont") +
  tm_layout(
  legend.outside = TRUE,
  legend.outside.position = "right",
  legend.frame = FALSE,
  legend.text.size = 0.8,
  legend.title.size = 1
)

map_hf <- 
  tm_shape(hillshade_gray) + 
  tm_raster(palette = gray.colors(100), alpha = 0.5, fill.legend = tm_legend_hide()) +
  tm_shape(elev) + 
  tm_raster(palette = gray.colors(100), alpha = 0.4, fill.legend = tm_legend_hide()) +
  tm_shape(covars_sf) + 
  tm_dots(col = "hf", palette = "viridis", size = 0.5, style = "cont") #+
#  tm_layout(
#  legend.outside = TRUE,
#  legend.outside.position = "right",
#  legend.frame = FALSE,
#  legend.text.size = 0.8,
#  legend.title.size = 1

tmap_arrange(map_pc1, map_pc2, map_hf, ncol = 3)
```
